channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House Democrats' Old Guard Strikes Back in California
item.description: California primaries were expected to be a major victory for younger Democrats seeking to oust aging incumbents, but that outcome did not materialize.

item.title: Trump confirms using profanity in call with Netanyahu over Lebanon
item.description: President Trump confirmed he harshly criticized Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu about Lebanon during a tense phone call, as reported by Axios.

item.title: Exclusive: IBM CEO supports Trump's revised AI executive order
item.description: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna endorsed the Trump administration's executive order on artificial intelligence and cybersecurity at Axios' AI+NY Summit on Wednesday.

item.title: Scott Pelley fired from "60 Minutes" after tense exchange
item.description: New executive producer Nick Bilton fired Scott Pelley after the veteran anchor publicly criticized him in front of staff.
